positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_coco
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u36,axiom,
    ranked_high(coco)).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    ~male(coco)).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    lost_to_iga(coco)).

cnf(u50,axiom,
    female(coco)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    coco != rafael).

cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    ~lost_to_rafael(coco)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~lost_to_iga(X0) | ranked_high(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    iga != rafael).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    coco != iga).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~at_rg2022(X0) | male(X0) | female(X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~at_rg2022(X0) | ~female(X0) | lost_to_iga(X0)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~male(X0) | lost_to_rafael(X0) | ~at_rg2022(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    at_rg2022(coco)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define most_active(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
